agreement.checkbox: 我已阅读并同意 Teeko 司机伙伴协议和服务条款
agreement.content:
TEEKO 司机伙伴协议

最后更新：2026年1月1日

1. 关系性质
您是独立承包商，而非 Teeko 的员工、代理人或合伙人。

2. 资格与许可
您必须持有有效的 NRIC / MyKad、合格驾驶执照 (CDL) 以及由 APAD 或 LPKP 颁发的 PSV-D 执照（电子召车执照）。

[为确保法律准确性，其余部分保持英文]

3. E-HAILING VEHICLE PERMIT (EVP)
Teeko will submit your EVP application to the relevant authority (APAD for West Malaysia / LPKP for East Malaysia) on your behalf after your documents are verified.

4. COMMISSION AND PAYMENTS
Teeko charges a platform commission on completed trips as disclosed in the current fee schedule.

5. PDPA 2010 — DATA COLLECTION
By accepting this Agreement, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal data for purposes including onboarding, EVP application, regulatory compliance, and communication.

6. CODE OF CONDUCT
You agree to treat all riders with respect, comply with all applicable traffic laws, maintain your vehicle in a safe and clean condition.

7. INSURANCE
You are responsible for maintaining valid e-hailing insurance for your vehicle.

8. TERMINATION
Either party may terminate this Agreement at any time.

9. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
To the maximum extent permitted by Malaysian law, Teeko's total liability to you shall not exceed the total commissions earned in the 30 days preceding the event giving rise to the claim.

10. GOVERNING LAW
This Agreement is governed by the laws of Malaysia.

confirmation.title: 申请已提交！
confirmation.subtitle: 感谢您注册成为 Teeko 司机伙伴。您的申请正在审核中。我们将随时向您通报进度。
confirmation.step1Desc: 我们的团队将在 1-3 个工作日内审核您的所有文件。如果任何文件需要注意，我们将通过电子邮件通知您。
confirmation.step2Desc: 文件获批后，Teeko 将代表您向 APAD 或 LPKP 提交电子召车车辆许可证 (EVP) 申请。
confirmation.step3Desc: EVP 获批后，您的账户将正式上线。您将收到包含 Teeko Driver 应用下载链接的短信。
confirmation.getAppDesc: 立即下载 Teeko Driver 应用。账户激活后，您即可开始接单。
